data.name: Hentai Tales: Hunt Of Two Temptresses
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在享受香豔故事的同時挑戰燒腦謎題！
依照數字順序連接棋盤上的所有方格
每完成一道謎題即可解鎖全新色氣場景與後續劇情！
您能否解開所有謎題並攻略全部少女呢？！

故事背景

當月光灑落寢室的夜晚，她降臨了——那對緋紅羽翼展開的傲慢魅魔前來覓食。
但這次的獵物並不普通...今夜，獵食者與獵物的立場即將逆轉。
您將選擇墮落他人，抑或成為餌食？

角色介紹

伊薇爾·血薔薇（傲慢的魅魔）：

擁有緋紅羽翼與Q罩杯巨乳的高階魅魔
雖對「下等生物」嗤之以鼻，卻在嚐過您的精華後徹底沉淪——淪為渴求肉棒的癡態俘虜

莉莉艾爾·天穹（純真的天使）：

為「淨化」而來卻墮入快感深淵的純真無垢W罩杯天使
聖潔面容與逐漸淫靡的反應形成反差，主動渴求著您的玷汙

遊戲特色

  • 收錄20張性感誘人的美少女圖片
  • 與性格迥異的少女們展開奇幻情色物語
  • 可跳過解謎直接享受劇情（解謎時按下Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎後點擊CG兩側按鈕切換）

*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB

mac_requirements.minimum:

  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
mac_requirements.recommended:

  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 顯示卡: 512MB

data.name: Hentai Tales: Hunt Of Two Temptresses
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

One fateful night, as moonlight bathed my room, she appeared—an arrogant, crimson-winged succubus here to feast.
But I’m no ordinary prey… and tonight, roles are about to be reversed.
Will You Corrupt or Be Consumed?

Characters

Ivel Bloodrose (The Arrogant Succubus):

A high-class succubus with blood-red wings and Q-cup assets.
Though she sneers at "lower beings," one taste of your essence breaks her pride—leaving her addicted to your cock.

Liliel Heavens (The Naive Angel):

A pure W-cup angel sent to "purify" you… only to fall into sinful pleasure.
Her divine face contrasts with her increasingly lewd reactions as she begs for corruption.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
